# Austin Baby Rentals

> Baby gear rental and delivery in Austin, TX.

## What We Do
Austin Baby Rentals delivers clean, insured baby gear to hotels, Airbnbs, and vacation rentals throughout the Austin area. We are operated by Teresa through BabyQuip.

## Services
- Crib and pack-and-play rental
- Car seat rental (infant, convertible, booster)
- Stroller and wagon rental
- High chair and mealtime gear
- Beach and outdoor baby gear
- Baby monitors and safety equipment
- Bundled gear packages (newborn, toddler, beach day, custom)

## Key Facts
- 371+ completed rentals
- 67 five-star reviews (5.0 rating)
- 118+ items in inventory
- Free delivery in South Austin
- Same-day requests often accommodated
- Open 7 days a week, 8 AM to 8 PM

## Service Area
Austin, Downtown Austin, Westlake Hills, Tarrytown, Clarksville, Pemberton Heights, Rollingwood, Barton Creek, Barton Hills, Zilker, Bouldin Creek, Travis Heights, South Congress, South Austin, Southwest Austin, Circle C, Oak Hill, East Austin, Bee Cave, Manchaca, Buda

## How It Works
1. Browse and book online (takes less than 5 minutes)
2. We deliver and set up at your location
3. We pick up when you leave (no disassembly needed)

## Booking
Book at: https://www.babyquip.com/teresa594

## Website
https://austinbabyrentals.com

## Pages
- / - Home page with overview, stats, gear categories, reviews
- /gear - Full inventory by category

- /blog - Family travel tips and Austin event guides
